name: Pre-commit hook enforcement
description: Ensure the agent respects the repository's pre-commit hook workflow and does not complete a commit if the hook fails.

actions.message: This repository runs a pre-commit hook before each commit.
actions.detail: If the pre-commit hook fails, read the hook output carefully and fix the reported issue before retrying. Do not proceed with a commit or push until the hook passes.

notes: The repository uses .githooks/pre-commit for Git hook enforcement.
If pre-commit fails, capture stderr output and act on the exact failure message.
Do not bypass the hook by forcing a commit or skipping checks unless the user explicitly requests it.
